name: Color-Coded Drug Discovery Pipeline
input: Create a left-to-right flowchart showing a drug discovery pipeline with color-coded stages. Target Identification (blue): Literature Mining, HTS Screen, Target Validation. Lead Optimization (green): SAR Studies, ADMET Testing, Formulation. Preclinical (orange): In Vitro Studies, Animal Models, Toxicology. Clinical (red): Phase I, Phase II, Phase III. Add decision diamonds between each stage: Go/No-Go Decision. Use classDef for color groups.
qualityCriteria: At least 3 distinct color groups defined
Valid Mermaid syntax that parses without errors
napkinBenchmark: Horizontal pipeline with 4 color-coded phases, 3 decision gates, professional pharma pipeline appearance.
